translit: hayom yom rishon bashabos shebo hoyu halviyim omrim beveiys hamikdosh:

ledovid mizmor layho hooretz vmloo teiveil veyshveiy vo: ki  al yamim yesodo veal nehoros yechonneho: mi yaale vehar Adonoy vmi yokum bimkom kodsho: neki chapayim vvar leivov asher lo noso lashov nafshi velo nishba lemirmo: yiso verocho meieis Adonoy vtzdoko meieloheiy yisho: ze dor dorshoyv mevaksheiy foneycho yaakov selo: seu sheorim rosheiychem vehinosu pischeiy olom veyovo melech hakovod: mi ze melech hakovod Adonoy izuz vegibor Adonoy gibor milchomo: seu sheorim rosheiychem vsu pischeiy olom veyovo melech hakovod: mi  ze melech hakovod Adonoy tzevoos  melech hakovod selo:
hayom yom sheini bashabos shebo hoyu halviyim omrim beveiys hamikdosh:

shir mizmor livneiy korach: godol Adonoy vmhulol meod beir eloheiynu har kodsho: yefei nof mesos kol hooretz har tzion yarkseiy tzofon kiryas melech rov: elohim bearmnoseyho noda lemisgov: ki hinei hamlochim noadu ovru yachdov: heimo rou kein tomohu nivhalu nechpozu: reodo achozosam shom chil kayoleido: berucha kodim teshabeir onios tarshish: kaasher shomanu kein roinu beir Adonoy tzevoos beir eloheiynu elohim yechonneho ad olom selo: diminu elohim chasdecho bekerev heiycholecho: keshimcho elohim kein tehiloscho al katzveiy eretz tzedek molo yeminecho: yismach har tzion togeilno benos yehudo lemaan mishpoteycho: sobu tzion vehakifuho sifru migdoleyho: shisu libchem lecheiylo pasgu armnoseyho lemaan tesapru ledor acharon: ki ze elohim eloheiynu olom voed  yenahageinu al :
hayom yom shelishi bashabos shebo hoyu halviyim omrim beveiys hamikdosh:

mizmor leosof elohim nitzov baadas eil bekerev elohim yishpot: ad mosay tishptu ovel vfneiy reshoim tisu selo: shiftu dol veyosom oni vorosh hatzdiku: paltu dal veevyon miyad reshoim hatzilu: lo yodu velo yovinu bachasheicho yishalochu yimotu kol mosdeiy oretz: ani omarti elohim atem vvneiy elyon kulchem: ochein keodom temusun vchachad hasorim tipolu: kumo elohim shofto hooretz ki ato sinchal bechol hagoyim:
hayom yom revii bashabos shebo hoyu halviyim omrim beveiys hamikdosh:

eil nekomos Adonoy eil nekomos hofia: hinosei shofeit hooretz hosheiv gemul al geiim: ad mosay reshoim Adonoy ad mosay reshoim yaalozu: yabiu yedabru osok yisamru kol poaleiy oven: amcho Adonoy yedaku venachaloscho yeanu: almono vegeir yaharogu visomim yeratzeichu: vayomru lo yire Adonoy velo yovin eloheiy yaakov: binu boarim boom vchsilim mosay taskilu: hanota ozen halo yishmo im yotzeir ayin halo yabit: hayoseir goyim halo yochicha hamlameid odom doas: Adonoy yodeia machshvos odom ki heimo hovel: ashreiy hagever asher teyasrenu Adonoy vmitoroscho selamdenu: lehashkit lo mimeiy ro ad yikore lorosho shochas: ki lo yitsh Adonoy amo venachaloso lo yaazov: ki ad tzedek yoshuv mishpot veacharoyv kol yishreiy leiv: mi yokum li im mereiim mi yisyatzeiv li im poaleiy oven: luleiy Adonoy ezroso li kimat shochno dumo nafshi: im omarti moto ragli chasdcho Adonoy yisodeini: berov sarapay bekirbi tanchumeycho yeshaashu nafshi: haychovrcho kisei havoos yotzeir omol aleiy chok: yogodu al nefesh tzadik vedom noki yarshiu: vayhi Adonoy li lemisgov veilohay letzur machsi: vayoshev aleiyhem es onom vvroosom yatzmiseim yatzmiseim Adonoy eloheiynu: lechu neranno layho norio letzur yisheinu: nekadmo fonoyv besodo bizmiros noria lo: ki eil godol Adonoy vmelech godol al kol elohim:
hayom yom chamishi bashabos shebo hoyu halviyim omrim beveiys hamikdosh:

lamnatzeicha al hagitis leosof: harninu leilohim uzeinu horiu leiloheiy yaakov: seu zimro vsnu sof kinor noim im novel: tiku vachodesh shofor bakese leyom chageinu: ki chok leyisroeil  mishpot leiloheiy yaakov: eidus bihoseif somo betzeiso al eretz mitzroyim sefas lo yodati eshmo: hasirosi miseivel shichmo kapoyv midud taavorno: batzoro koroso voachaltzeko eencho beseiser raam evchoncho al meiy merivo selo: shema ami veoido boch yisroeil im tishma li: lo yihye vecho eil zor velo sishtachave leeil neichor: onochi Adonoy eloheycho hamaalcho meieretz mitzroyim harchev picho vaamaleihu: velo shoma ami lekoli veyisroeil lo ovo li: voashalcheihu bishrirus libom yeilchu bemoatzoseiyhem:  ami shomeia li yisroeil bidrochay yehaleichu: kimat oyveiyhem achnia veal tzoreiyhem oshiv yodi: mesaneiy Adonoy yechachashu lo vihi itom leolom: vayaachileihu meicheilev chito vmitzur devash asbieko:
hayom yom shishi bashabos shebo hoyu halviyim omrim beveiys hamikdosh:

Adonoy moloch geius loveish loveish Adonoy oz hisazor af tikon teiveil bal timot: nochon kisacho meioz meiolom oto: nosu nehoros Adonoy nosu nehoros kolom yisu nehoros dochyom: mikolos mayim rabim adirim mishbreiy yom adir bamorom Adonoy: eidoseycho neemnu meod leveiyscho noavo kodesh Adonoy leorech yomim:
